info.title: Harness NextGen Software Delivery Platform API Reference
info.description: This is the Open Api Spec 3 for the NextGen Manager. This is under active development. Beware of the breaking change with respect to the generated code stub

get.description: Retrieves the information of the organizations.

parameters.name: account
parameters.description: Slug field of the account the resource is scoped to. This is required for Authorization method other than x-api-key header. If you are using x-api-key header this can be skipped.

parameters.name: org
parameters.description: Slug field of the organizations the resource is scoped to

parameters.name: search_term
parameters.description: This would be used to filter resources having attributes matching with search term.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Pagination page number strategy: Specify the page number within the paginated collection related to the number of items in each page

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Pagination: Number of items to return

Link.description: Links to related resources, in the format defined by [RFC 5988](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc5988#section-5). This will include a link with relation type `next` to the next page, if there is a next page.

example-organizations-list-response-yaml.value:
- org:
    slug: example_organization
    name: Example Organization
    description: This is an example organization
    tags:
      example-tag-1: example-tag-1-value
      example-tag-2: example-tag-2-value
  created: 1234567890
  updated: 1234567890
  harness_managed: true

parameters.name: account
parameters.description: Slug field of the account the resource is scoped to. This is required for Authorization method other than x-api-key header. If you are using x-api-key header this can be skipped.

example-organization-response-yaml.value:

  slug: example_organization

  tags:

created: 1234567890
updated: 1234567890
harness_managed: true

get.description: Retrieves the information of the projects.

parameters.name: account
parameters.description: Slug field of the account the resource is scoped to. This is required for Authorization method other than x-api-key header. If you are using x-api-key header this can be skipped.

parameters.name: org
parameters.description: Slug field of the organizations the resource is scoped to

parameters.name: project
parameters.description: Slug field of the projects the resource is scoped to

parameters.name: has_module
parameters.description: This boolean specifies whether to filter projects which has the module of type passed in the moduleType parameter or not

parameters.name: module_type
parameters.description: Project's module type

parameters.name: search_term
parameters.description: This would be used to filter resources having attributes matching with search term.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Pagination page number strategy: Specify the page number within the paginated collection related to the number of items in each page

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Pagination: Number of items to return

Link.description: Links to related resources, in the format defined by [RFC 5988](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc5988#section-5). This will include a link with relation type `next` to the next page, if there is a next page.Link

get.description: Retrieves the information of the connectors.

parameters.name: account
parameters.description: Slug field of the account the resource is scoped to. This is required for Authorization method other than x-api-key header. If you are using x-api-key header this can be skipped.

example-list-connector-response-yaml.value:
- connector:
    name: example_connector
    slug: example_connector
    org: default
    project: example_project
    tags:
      property1: example_connector
    description: example_connector
    spec:
        type: GitHttp
        url: 'https://github.com/example/example-repo.git'
        branch: example_branch
        connection_type: Repo
        username: git-http-user
        password_ref: account.git-http-password
  created: 1234567890
  updated: 1234567890

parameters.name: account

get.description: Retrieves the information of the secrets.

parameters.name: account
parameters.description: Slug field of the account the resource is scoped to. This is required for Authorization method other than x-api-key header. If you are using x-api-key header this can be skipped.

parameters.name: org
parameters.description: Slug field of the organization the resource is scoped to

parameters.name: project
parameters.description: Slug field of the project the resource is scoped to

parameters.name: secret
parameters.description: Slug field of secrets

parameters.name: type
parameters.description: Secret types on which the filter will be applied

parameters.name: recursive
parameters.description: Expand current scope to include all child scopes

parameters.name: search_term
parameters.description: This would be used to filter resources having attributes matching with search term.

parameters.name: page
parameters.description: Pagination page number strategy: Specify the page number within the paginated collection related to the number of items in each page

parameters.name: limit
parameters.description: Pagination: Number of items to return

Link.description: Links to related resources, in the format defined by [RFC 5988](https://tools.ietf.org/html/rfc5988#section-5). This will include a link with relation type `next` to the next page, if there is a next page.Link

example-list-secret-response-yaml.value:
- secret:
    name: example_secret
    slug: example_secret
    org: default
    project: example_project
    tags:
      property1: example_secret
    description: example_secret
    spec:
      type: SSHKeyPath
      port: 80
      username: example_secret
      key_path: example_secret
      encrypted_passphrase: account.example_secret
  created: 1234567890
  updated: 1234567890
  draft: false

parameters.name: account
parameters.description: Slug field of the account the resource is scoped to. This is required for Authorization method other than x-api-key header. If you are using x-api-key header this can be skipped.

parameters.name: private_secret
parameters.description: This would be used to define secret as private.

example-secret-response-yaml.value:
secret:
  name: example_secret
  slug: example_secret
  org: default
  project: example_project
  tags:
    property1: example_secret
  description: example_secret
  spec:
    type: SSHKeyPath
    port: 80
    username: example_secret
    key_path: example_secret
    encrypted_passphrase: account.example_secret
created: 1234567890
updated: 1234567890
draft: false

cross_account_role_arn.description: If you want to use one AWS account for the connection, but you want to deploy or build in a different AWS account. In this scenario, the AWS account used for AWS access in Credentials will assume the IAM role you specify in Cross-account role ARN setting. This option uses the AWS Security Token Service (STS) feature.

external_id.description: If the administrator of the account to which the role belongs provided you with an external ID, then enter that value.

test_region.description: By default, Harness uses the us-east-1 region to test the credentials for this Connector. If you want to use an AWS GovCloud account for this Connector, select it in Test Region. GovCloud is used by organizations such as government agencies at the federal, state, and local level, as well as contractors, educational institutions. It is also used for regulatory compliance with these organizations.

OrgQueryParam.name: org
OrgQueryParam.description: Slug field of the organization the resource is scoped to

ProjectQueryParam.name: project
ProjectQueryParam.description: Slug field of the project the resource is scoped to

AccountQueryParam.name: account
AccountQueryParam.description: Slug field of the account the resource is scoped to. This is required for Authorization method other than x-api-key header. If you are using x-api-key header this can be skipped.

OrgsQueryParam.name: org
OrgsQueryParam.description: Slug field of the organizations the resource is scoped to

ProjectsQueryParam.name: project
ProjectsQueryParam.description: Slug field of the projects the resource is scoped to

OrgPathParam.name: org
OrgPathParam.description: Slug field of the organization the resource is scoped to

PrivateSecret.name: private_secret
PrivateSecret.description: This would be used to define secret as private.

ProjectPathParam.name: project
ProjectPathParam.description: Slug field of the project the resource is scoped to

example-winrm-ntlm-secret-request-yaml.value:
secret:
  name: example_secret
  slug: example_secret
  org: default
  project: example_project
  tags:
    property1: example_secret
  description: example_secret
  spec:
    type: WinRmNTLM
    port: 5986
    domain: example-domain
    username: example-username
    password: example-password
    use_ssl: true
    skip_cert_checks: true
    use_no_profile: true

example-create-git-http-connector-reques.value:

  name: example_connector
  slug: example_connector
  description: example_connector
  org: default
  project: example_project
  tags:
    property1: example_connector
  spec:
    type: GitHttpConnector
    url: https://github.com/example/example-repo.git
    branch: example_branch
    connection_type: Repo
    username: git-http-user
    password_ref: account.git-http-password
    execute_on_delegate: false

example-create-git-ssh-connector-request.value:
connector:
  name: example_connector
  slug: example_connector
  description: example_connector
  org: default
  project: example_project
  tags:
    property1: example_connector
  spec:
    type: GitSshConnector
    url: 'https://github.com/example/example-repo.git'
    branch: example_branch
    connection_type: Repo
    ssh_key_ref: account.git-http-password
    execute_on_delegate: false

example-create-aws-code-commit-connector.value:
connector:
  name: example_connector
  slug: example_connector
  description: example_connector
  org: default
  project: example_project
  tags:
    property1: example_connector
  spec:
    type: AwsCodeCommit
    url: 'https://git-codecommit.us-east-2.amazonaws.com/v1/repos/MyDemoRepo'
    url_type: Repo
    access_key_ref: account.aws-access-key
    secret_key_ref: account.aws-secret-key
